title: Rechargeable Keychain Flashlights, High Lumens EDC Mini Flashlights, COB Keychain Work Light Flashlights 7 Light Modes, Bright Mini Keychain Light for Walking, Searching and Hiking
features: 【MINI FLASHLIGHTS HIGH LUMENS】 Compact & Lightweight: 70 Gram , 3.5*1.0 inches mini design, It can attached to backpack, Clothes or as keychain, Which is very convenient for daily use.

【7 LIGHT MODES WITH RED-BLUE FLASHING】: Mini keychain flashlight has 8 light modes: Main Light: White Light Bright, White Light Dim, White Light Strobe, SOS. COB side lights: White Light Bright, White Light Strobe, Red-Blue Light Strobe, Red-Blue Light Strobe function can make it easier for pedestrians to notice your location in dark places to avoid unexpected situations.

【TYPE-C RECHARGEABLE KEYCHAIN FLASHLIGHTS】: Mini rechargeable LED flashlight keychain features an internal 1000mAh rechargeable battery, providing 4-10 hours of use after charging. The side light can operate continuously for up to 10 hours when fully charged. During charging, the green indicator light flashes, and when fully charged, the green indicator light remains lit. Note: The high-power mini flashlight will heat up when in use, which is a normal phenomenon and not a quality problem.
【DURABLE AND WATERPROOF】 Made of sturdy alloy material, it is shock-resistant and IPX8 waterproof. It ensures stable operation in rainy or humid environments and is suitable for outdoor adventures.

【CUSTOMER SERVICE】 We have 2 years of free replacement service and 7*25 hours of customer service. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We will offer you a satisfactory solution.
description: This mini high-lumen flashlight is compact and lightweight, weighing only 70 grams with a 3.5*1.5-inch design, making it easy to attach to backpacks, clothes, or use as a keychain for daily convenience. It features 7 light modes, including bright white, dim white, strobe, SOS, and COB side lights with red-blue strobe for enhanced visibility in emergencies. Powered by a 1000mAh rechargeable battery with Type-C charging, it offers 4-10 hours of use and is IPX6 waterproof, corrosion-resistant, and durable for activities like hiking, fishing, and night patrols.(Black)
